requirements.statement: All critical enforcement must run outside the model context
requirements.notes: Hook engine built. Bash hooks also exist for Claude Code sessions.

requirements.statement: Domain-specific answers must use KB or graph grounding
requirements.notes: Component 10 (KB Grounding Layer) not yet built. Phase 2 priority 5.
Hook engine supports completion_gate event. Phase gate enforces sequencing.

requirements.statement: Agents are untrusted by default and minimally privileged
requirements.notes: Component 17 (Agent Trust & Containment) not yet built. Phase 2 priority 6.

requirements.statement: Every governed task produces immutable audit evidence
requirements.notes: Audit log built and tested. Compliance-ready schema. Needs provenance expansion.

requirements.statement: Tool calls must pass schema and governance checks
requirements.notes: Components 12 (Tool Governance) and 16 (Schema Enforcement) not yet built. Phase 2 priorities 1-2.

requirements.statement: Model outputs conflicting with KB truth must trigger arbitration
Prompt injection and hostile inputs must be filtered before execution
requirements.notes: Component 11 (Security / Injection Defense) not yet built. Phase 2 priority 3.

requirements.statement: Runtime behavior must match declared workflow contracts
requirements.notes: Component 18 (Spec Conformance & Drift Engine) not yet built. Phase 2 priority 9.

requirements.statement: Every active skill, tool, and control must trace to a requirement
requirements.notes: RTM created (this file). Component 18 will read it for conformance checks.
